issue_summary: BaseNCodecOutputStream only supports writing EOF on close().
javadoc_before:
/**
 * Abstract superclass for Base-N output streams.
 *
 * @since 1.5
 * @version $Id$
 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Abstract superclass for Base-N output streams. *

* To write the EOF marker without closing the stream, call {@link #eof()} or use an Apache Commons IO CloseShieldOutputStream. *

* * @since 1.5 * @version $Id$ */
